/home/runner/work/ai-test/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/battle_server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/battle_server.dir/server/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_server.dir/server/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_server.dir/server/src/session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_server.dir/server/src/room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_server.dir/server/src/game.cpp.o -o battle_server  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0
